name: spleen_seg
description: Spleen CT segmentation using MONAI's UNet (spleen_ct_segmentation bundle). Accepts a 3D abdominal CT NIfTI volume and returns a 2-class mask (background / spleen).

help.summary: Spleen CT segmentation (2 classes) using MONAI UNet.
notes: Requires a 3D abdominal CT NIfTI volume.
